text: hey babe, you almost done? was thinking we could order thai and watch something tonight 🙏
yes leaving in like 20 mins. thai sounds perfect, can you order the usual for me?
already on it 😄 hurry home
hey dad you guys doing dinner sunday? been a while
yeah for sure! mom's been wanting to do her lasagna thing. come around 6?
perfect ill bring dessert 👍
Dad are you cooking this weekend or should we just order something
Was thinking I'd do that roast chicken you like, Saturday around 6? Invite whoever you want
yes please!! can Riley come too
yo nate!! it's been forever dude, what have you been up to lately?
tom!! honestly been crazy busy with work but finally getting a breather lol. you still living in Austin?
haha yeah still here! we gotta catch up properly man, drinks soon??
yo uncle nate did you know i have a math test tmrw 😭
lol yeah? you actually studying or just panicking rn
...both 💀 can u quiz me later
Hey Nate! Just checking in — how are you and the kids doing? 😊
We're good Marie! Kids are a handful as always lol. How's everything with you?
Ha! I bet 😄 All good here, just missing you all. Let me know if you need anything!
pancake supplies are low — grabbing eggs and buttermilk after shift

band rehearsal ran late, can you pick me up at 4:30
